differential_diagnoses: Common Variable Immunodeficiency (CVID) with granulomatous disease
Disseminated mycobacterial infection (e.g., M. avium complex)
next_steps: Measurement of serum immunoglobulin levels (IgG, IgA, IgM)
Dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry assay to evaluate neutrophil superoxide production
Genetic testing for CGD (CYBB and other relevant genes)
Measurement of lymphocyte subsets via flow cytometry
Repeat liver biopsy for tissue culture and molecular sequencing (e.g., 16S rRNA gene sequencing)
Bone marrow biopsy for repeat histology and possible genetic sequencing

differential_diagnoses: Chronic Granulomatous Disease (CGD) with late-onset or mosaic variant
Common Variable Immunodeficiency (CVID) with granulomatous-lymphocytic interstitial lung disease (GLILD)
next_steps: Dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry assay to assess neutrophil oxidative burst
Measurement of serum immunoglobulin levels (IgG, IgA, IgM) and vaccine-specific antibody titers
Metagenomic next-generation sequencing (mNGS) of hepatic biopsy tissue to identify occult pathogens
Whole-exome sequencing (WES) to evaluate for primary immunodeficiency or immune dysregulation syndromes
Evaluation for Hemophagocytic Lymphohistiocytosis (HLH) via ferritin, triglycerides, and soluble CD25
Immunophenotyping via flow cytometry (T, B, and NK cell subsets)
